file_title: IT Initiatives in Branding: Southwest Region
introduction: This presentation provides an overview of IT-led brand reinforcement initiatives within our Southwest stores, focusing specifically on the installation of brand-aligned keyboard LED lights during September 2025.

subsections.heading: Overview of IT-Driven Branding Initiatives
subsections.content:
• IT-Driven Branding Initiatives began in 2022, focusing on in-store digital displays
• Deployment of RFID technology to track in-store customer behavior started in 2023
• The integration of QR codes into product labels for additional product information was initiated in 2024
• AI-driven chatbot was introduced in 2025 to enhance customer service
• The use of Augmented Reality for in-store navigation is under consideration for 2026
• IT and Marketing departments collaborate closely for these initiatives, meeting bi-weekly to discuss progress and feedback
subsections.justification: This slide provides an overview of IT branding initiatives but doesn't include information on the specific LED installation requests.

subsections.heading: LED Installation Requests - September 2025
subsections.content:
• LED installations are handled by a dedicated IT sub-team
• The LED installation process includes a site survey, planning, and final installation
• LED installations typically take two weeks from request to completion
• The LED installations are part of a wider store modernization initiative
• LED installations have been completed in over 50 stores nationwide as of September 2025
• Each LED installation is followed by a post-installation review to ensure quality and effectiveness
subsections.justification: This slide focuses on the general LED installation process and does not provide specific data on the number of requests in September 2025.

subsections.heading: Impact and Evaluation of Brand-Aligned LEDs
subsections.content:
• Brand-aligned LEDs have been positively received by customers in pilot stores
• Store associates report increased customer engagement with brand-aligned LEDs
• Brand-aligned LEDs have contributed to an overall modern aesthetic in the stores
• Initial data show an increase in in-store traffic after LED installations
• A more formal evaluation of the impact of brand-aligned LEDs is planned for Q4 2025
• The cost-benefit analysis of the LED installations will be part of the annual IT review in 2026
subsections.justification: This slide discusses the impact and evaluation of the LED installations, but does not provide specific information on the number of requests in the Southwest region in September 2025.

conclusion: The led lighting initiative has been successful in reinforcing our brand identity in the Southwest region. Moving forward, we should explore other avenues for IT-driven brand enhancements.

image_queries.slide_title: Impact and Evaluation of Brand-Aligned LEDs
